name: neon-lang
description: Syntax highlighting and language server support for the Neon programming language.

neon.server.path.markdownDescription: Path to the `neon-lsp` executable. A bare name is looked up on `PATH`; a relative path is resolved against the first workspace folder. Supports `${workspaceFolder}` and `${userHome}`.

neon.server.enable.markdownDescription: Run the `neon-lsp` language server. When off, only syntax highlighting is provided — no diagnostics and no formatting.

neon.sysroot.markdownDescription: Directory containing the Neon `stdlib/` directory. Passed to the server as `NEON_SYSROOT`. When empty, the server inherits whatever `NEON_SYSROOT` the editor was launched with; if it is unset there too, the server degrades to lexer/parser diagnostics only and reports no type errors. Supports `${workspaceFolder}` and `${userHome}`.

neon.trace.server.description: Trace the JSON-RPC traffic between VS Code and the Neon language server, in the 'Neon Language Server' output channel.
